reviews.text: I couldn’t be more grateful for the exceptional service I received from Robert Fiore. I was in a terrible car accidenct and suffered several different injuries. Robert genuinely cared about my well-being throughout the entire process and helped me advocate for the proper medical care. His attention to detail and thorough approach ensured that every document and record was reviewed carefully and never rushed.  He was very communicative and always available to answer my questions  (and I had ALOT of questions).  He explained everything step by step as it was happening so that I was always informed. With his decades of legal experience, he was able to secure a settlement that was life changing for me. He even went above and beyond to negotiate and maximize my ultimate payout. I can never say enough great things about Robert and I am grateful to have had him representing me during one of the hardest times of my life. He is one of the best attorneys in his field and I highly recommend him to anyone in need of expert legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Liane, it was my privilege to represent you.

reviews.text: Robert was recommended to me when I had my accident. From the second he took on my case I knew I made the right choice. His knowledge and expertise is bar none. He's an incredible lawyer. He was genuine and truly cared and I really felt that. I can’t stress enough of how happy I was having Robert on my side.

Big thank you to Robert Fiore and his exceptional law firm for their invaluable assistance in my father's slip and fall case at his apartment complex. Their dedication, expertise, and commitment to ensuring we got the best outcome possible was surprising and praiseworthy!

From the outset, Robert Fiore and his team displayed confidence, tenacity, professionalism and empathy, assuring us they would do everything to secure a positive outcome.

Their decision to hire a private investigator to uncover safety failings at the complex showcased their thoroughness and commitment to victory.

Robert Fiore's legal knowledge and strategic approach were exceptional. He navigated the complexities of the case with finesse, leaving no stone unturned. His genuine care and open communication provided us with reassurance throughout the process.

In under seven months, Robert Fiore's unwavering determination resulted in a favorable settlement that exceeded our expectations. His speed and negotiation skills were impressive, providing both financial support and a sense of closure.

I wholeheartedly recommend Robert Fiore and his law firm for exceptional representation. Their commitment to clients and pursuit of justice are unparalleled. We are forever grateful for their support and the positive impact they've had on our lives.

As a US VETERAN, living on a fix income, Robert services was referred to me by a friend.  From the start of my case to the end, Robert has always been a phone call away.  Robert guided me to the light at the end of the tunnel.  Thank you, Mr. Robert J. Fiore, P.A. It would be an Honor to recommend your services.

The Stiers Law team is professional, proactive and they look after the best interests of their clients. Very knowledgeable about injury law and dealing with insurance companies. I would highly recommend working with the Stiers Law Team. You won't regret it.

Stiers law ,P.A is a ten out of ten ,I highly recommend.I was very pleased with the  result of my case .Mr.Stiers is dependable and very responsive .He’s also very consistent in making sure he goes over every process and detail throughout my case .

His remarks were well thought and always had my best interest at heart. I was actually sad when the suit ended as we will not be connecting as often as we were.

I was hit by a car on my bike in March, which broke my collarbone. I didn't have insurance so I was taken to Jackson for treatment. Eli forced GEICO to pay out the driver's full PIP -- they wanted to assign me 30% of the blame but they backed down after one strongly worded letter. Ultimately he got me a modest payout plus some money for my smashed bike, and he got Jackson to waive the remaining medical bills that the PIP didn't cover! All this was done over several months, not knowing if he would be paid at all.

I really recommend calling Eli if you are involved in a bicycle crash, he's the expert in Miami.

reviews.text: I highly recommend The Law Offices of Hoffman and Hoffman. They handle all my Estate Planning (Probate). The entire Hoffman team are very professional and knowledgeable. They were very attentive to my needs kept me informed and quick to respond to any questions. Special thanks to Ms. Teresa Hoffman, Maggie Brito and Christina Merz.

All I can say is wow.  Mr Hofffman is a master in the courtroom.  My son was arrested after hanging out with the wrong crowd.  We were unable to bond him out due to the nature of the case. At the magistrates he was able to get the judge to find no probable cause and my son got released ror, on a life felony!!
I called an attorney recommended by a bondsman what a joke.  Never fall victim to the bondsman attorney as they each get a piece of the action.  The other attorney said to call him after the magistrates, how lazy.  Evan went to court argued the case and my son was home.
Needless to say Evan got the case dismissed.  This review is but a token of my appreciation and gratitude, sorry for calling your cell all the time. Hopefully this review shows how much we care and know that there is actually a lawyer who cares about his clients.
My sons case may not be one of Mr Hoffman’s high profile cases but he certainly treated it as it was.  I am so grateful for evan.

I highly recommend the services of Hoffman and Hoffman.  Teresa Hoffman has been extremely helpful and provided guidance when I was setting up my will and related documents.  She explained each document and why it was needed.  She and her team also assisted with estate-related issues after my mother passed away.  They were timely, efficient, and always available to answer my questions..

We retained Hoffman and Hoffman to settle the estate of our son.  We could not have been more pleased with the professionalism, efficiency and compassion of Teresa, Sean and Christina.  They recovered assets from several sources we hardly were aware of, and had little idea how to pursue. They were understanding at times when we were not up to dealing with the financial matters surrounding our son's death.   They kept us apprised of fling numerous court documents without requiring any effort on our part. I had done the estate of my mother in upstate New York, which was a simple matter of dealing with the county clerk. In Florida (Miami-Dade) matters are much more involved and you do not want to engage in the process without a good attorney. Based on our experience we'd strongly recommend Hoffman and Hoffman.

Teresa was absolutely fantastic in obliging a major financial services company - Putnam - to return funds we had deposited on behalf of our son for his education. Oliver, 12, had died suddenly of leukemia and Putnam forced us to take legal action before they would return $30,000 to an estate that we were obliged to create for Oliver and for which in the process we had to prove that his funeral bill had been paid (to ensure he had no creditors). While Putnam simply raised one objection after another, while at the same time its Legal Department refused to engage directly, Teresa and her team handled what was for us an extremely painful situation with great heart, patience and determination. A deep thanks.

Well, honestly I don’t believe Ricky takes his job seriously, He was out partying on a Thursday during business hours when he took my case and later On that day, I couldn’t get him to finish the deal. By the next day I believe allegedly there was some funny under the table type business going on because he had complied giving bad advice in favor of the other person whom he was not representing. He made decisions I was not ok with and the transaction went in, wrong direction for the worst. I also believe he did that to make me go away and find a new lawyer, later I learned everything he had advised the seller todo was not safe terms even the title company would not honor this transaction. After he advised the bad deal he never followed back up and seemed attentional so one of the two this happened, I will let you all be the judge of that but this. During the process they ignored my calls including his secretary in the mid of my transaction carrying out this deal for days, The only consistency I had was me calling him, hoping he would answer the phone and emailing several times. It felt like I was begging him to do the job. I never seen A lawyer be unprofessional on this level. He could have ruined my life with this transaction, And I am really trying to figure out if he’s really a lawyer or not if so, if so how in the heck did he get his license? This type of behavior needs to be studied. God bless yawl be careful out there because in my opinion this was cruel of him, To waste my time and etc. Allegedly be blessed

My experience with Attorney Simeon was extremely frustrating and unprofessional. Despite repeated attempts to contact him regarding my case, he never returned my calls or emails. It felt like he was actively avoiding me and my concerns.

Additionally, when I tried to schedule office visits to discuss the progress of my case, Simeon was consistently unavailable or would reschedule at the last minute without explanation. This lack of communication and transparency left me feeling neglected and uncertain about the status of my legal matters.

Overall, I would not recommend Attorney Simeon to anyone seeking reliable and attentive legal representation. His failure to communicate and tendency to avoid office visits reflect poorly on his professionalism and commitment to his clients’ needs.

My experience with Attorney Simeon turned into a nightmare when I received a check from him after my case was resolved, only to have it bounce when I tried to cash it. This was not just an inconvenience but a serious breach of trust and professionalism.

Not only did the bounced check cause financial stress and inconvenience, but it also reflected poorly on Simeon’s ability to handle basic financial transactions. It’s unacceptable for an attorney to issue checks that cannot be honored, especially after a legal matter has been settled.

The lack of accountability and communication from Simeon’s office regarding the bounced check only added to the frustration. I would strongly advise anyone considering legal representation with Attorney Simeon to proceed with caution, as my experience with him was nothing short of a financial disaster.

2023 We invited Your Insurance Attorney into our home and we regretted it ever since. We had damage to our roof and a slab leak in our kitchen. We were told we definitely had a case and they will get our home fixed. We went through the process and its been a nightmare ever since. Your Insurance Attorney called and said "Sorry your case lost". My heart dropped. How? How can this be? Buy insurance, damage happens, damage gets covered. Not so simple after all. I asked multiple times for the court documents. I had to search for myself. What i read from that judge is heartbreaking. Court dates were missed, filings were late, and proof of the damage didnt exsist. What we pay for actually does not exsist. Judge seemed frustrated and now we recieve a call asking how much we want to pay in attorneys fee for losing. Wait...what? Beyond angry, we were sickened. Now our property insurance is up for renewal by April 7th 2026. We are responsible to have all damages repaired by this date. Cost us $20,000 for a new roof. $6,000 for rerouting of our water pipes. Plus $2,700 for renewal of insurance. Thats not all. Now we have mediation on 3-10-2026. We were never informed from Cameron Lewis our attorney during mediation of our rights. We were threatened that our house will be taken from my son and forced to sell to get thier money. Also if we didnt settle the judge would force us to pay up to $30,000 maybe more because we would go to court and the fees would rack up. Not once did he tell us our home is protected by homestead and that protection goes on to my son because he is soul heir to the estate and hes lineage. Not once did he tell us that because we are both disabled and collect ssi the judge would most likely reduce the Attorney's fees not make them higher.  All is a possibility, but Cameron Lewis never mentioned this to us. NOT ONCE. He agreed with the mediator and told us we had no choice! Now we are responsible to pay another $10,000 to Citizens for attorney's fees. I also am still responsible to continue making payments for insurance i do not have. Now I email these simple questions  about not telling us our rights and I recieve an email that he is no longer our Attorney, to find someone else. Ofcourse he did. The damage is done. I should have known when they had our estimate of damages for more than what the house is worth. That was a red flag.
They settled my case, when the insurance company denied my roof claim. Thank you....

I am very impressed and grateful for the hard work this Law Firm did on my behalf.

Sunny is a great attorney and a good person. He was very fair on fees and really worked on the details of my case. I was out of state but Sunny was always easy to reach and promptly kept in touch. Sunny Mullick P.A. was super professional and very knowledgeable.  He was able to assist me in a very timely manner.  I would highly recommend his services for your legal needs!

I highly recommend Suuny Mulllick. He was very helpful and with my case.

Sundeep Mullick is an extremely competent and professional attorney who effectively and efficiently gets the job done. He gets back to me immediately and carefully listens to my needs. I will definitely use his services again.

A true professional.
Very knowledgeable attorney. Amazing service and explains the legal process so that all can understand. So happy to have found him.

Once again this firm has managed to get a referred client - exceptional results. The attention to detail and client care are what makes them a step up from other litigation firms. Keep doing great things!  I highly recommend!
Experienced and Responsible, Highly Recommended!

Sunny is a super responsive, professional, and always makes time for his clients.

My husband and I have used Mr. Gettis's services a few times, very satisfied every time. He keeps in touch with us personally throughout the process resulting in an outcome worth waiting for. He was recommended to us and we we will recommend him to others!

Great experience overall. They are very professional and caring to the quality and treatment they give to their clients. Definitely recommend their services :)

They were always attentive to my case, very patient with me as I made my decisions, and guided me to ensure I received the best possible outcome. They found excellent doctors for me, and my surgery was a success, as was the disappointment surrounding my case. Their secretary was wonderful, a truly great person. I highly recommend them. Thank you.

Waited over 10 days to speak to Dean M Gettis. Finally got a call from him today, he basically told me he could not do anything because the person at fault's insurance, was difficult to deal with. He also told me I would have better luck talking to the insurance adjuster myself.
I did not even get a chance to ask any questions, not even a face to face meeting with the lawyer or one piece of legal advice. I thought I hired a lawyer to fight for me and my rights. Wasted my time now I'm back at square one.

Dean and his staff (Melissa & Caroline) are the best! I personally spoke to Dean several times throughout my case which I never dealt with a lawyer directly until it was time to pay and that says a lot about him. He is directly involved with his clients and cases and his staff is very good at communicating what needs to be done and don’t mind explaining if you don’t understand. VERY VERY NICE family oriented people and I highly recommend them for personal injury lawyer cases.

Mr.Gettis is a great attorney, always available to get/give advice and his staff is very kind and helpful especially his assistant Melissa. Dean Gettis works hard on your case and to get the most out of your claim! I’d recommend him to anyone.

Thank you Dean Gettis Law Firm!

Great people...great service...if I could give a  10 stars rating I will 👍🏼👍🏼👍🏼👍🏼

I am very pleased with the settlement I received and would recommend Mr Gettis and his staff to anyone I know who is looking for a good attorney. They are THE BEST!!

Dean and his staff has shown great professionalism. they are dedicated to helping their clients in all ways. He keeps the client informed of progress and assists with any problems. I would fully recommend him to anyone .

Excellent staff, excellent service, excellent  results.

I have a startup and Danny has been there since the beginning. I appreciate his attention to detail, keeping me up to date on changing regulations, and being a great sounding board! He takes time to really get to know the business so that he can give you appropriate advice! Hire him but don't take too much of his time because I need him!

I recently worked with Daniel to get clarity on an operating agreement between me and a business partner. From our initial call, he provided thoughtful, practical advice and helped us understand the key issues and options for moving forward, especially considering that we are based in different countries.

He was easy to communicate with, highly dependable, and clearly outlined different paths, including estimates, pros and cons, and transparent explanations of how he would handle potential conflicts. I really appreciated his clarity, professionalism, and the way he broke down complex legal considerations into actionable guidance.

I highly recommend Daniel to anyone seeking clear, strategic, and trustworthy legal advice.

I can’t say enough about my attorney Danny Weiss! Danny’s been part of my team for the last 6yrs! As our business continues to grow Danny has been at the legal “foundation” to create stability and security on all levels. He’s not only a trusting professional he’s creative and fun to work with. He delivers on his promise with a quick turnaround! I am blessed having Danny by my side and highly recommend him to anyone looking for a loyal long term team player for your business! Thank you Danny for everything!
You truly are the BEST!
Michelle Joy Kramer, Naples FL

As the owner of Mojo Advisors, LLC, I’ve had the privilege of working with Danny Weiss for over a year, and I can confidently say that his legal expertise has been a cornerstone in our business’s success. Danny has been our go-to attorney for a wide range of legal matters, from meticulously reviewing and drafting customer and vendor contracts to representing us in complex litigation. His ability to navigate both the intricate details of legal documents and the high-stakes environment of the courtroom has been nothing short of exceptional.

On the contract side, Danny has consistently ensured that our agreements are not only legally sound but also strategically crafted to protect Mojo’s interests while fostering strong business relationships. His attention to detail and foresight in anticipating potential risks have saved us from countless headaches down the road. Whether it’s negotiating terms with vendors or ensuring compliance with customers, Danny work has given us the confidence to operate with clarity and security.
Where Danny truly stands out, however, is in litigation. He has successfully guided us through plaintiff work, where we’ve had to pursue customers for millions of dollars in damages due to breach of contract, non-payment, and non-compliance. His strategic approach to these cases, combined with his deep understanding of the law, has resulted in favorable outcomes every time. Additionally, Danny has expertly handled the defense side, swiftly dismantling frivolous counterclaims brought against us by disgruntled parties. His ability to cut through baseless arguments and secure dismissals has been critical in protecting our resources and reputation.

What makes Danny an invaluable partner is his rare blend of legal acumen and business savvy. He doesn’t just provide textbook legal advice; he takes the time to understand our business model, goals, and challenges, tailoring his guidance to align with our operational needs. This business-conscious approach ensures that his solutions are not only legally robust but also practical and cost-effective, making him an ideal resource for any company seeking a lawyer who can operate at the intersection of law and commerce.

Every engagement with Danny has yielded successful results, and his track record with Mojo speaks for itself. From securing multi-million-dollar judgments to crafting ironclad contracts, he has consistently delivered outcomes that strengthen our business. Looking ahead, we have no hesitation in continuing to rely on Daniel for all our relevant legal needs. His professionalism, responsiveness, and dedication to our success make him an indispensable ally.

If you’re a business owner or executive searching for a legal professional who combines top-tier expertise with a deep understanding of business dynamics, I wholeheartedly recommend Danny Weiss. He’s not just a lawyer—he’s a strategic partner who will go above and beyond to protect and advance your interests. We’re grateful for his partnership and will continue to turn to him for years to come.

I had the pleasure of meeting Danny Weiss through a national networking group. During a brief 10-minute Zoom call with several others, we immediately connected. Danny explained that he works with small and medium-sized businesses, offering a full range of services that include contracts, legal strategy, and business structure.

What stood out to me was the time Danny took to understand my franchise business. He quickly recognized a good fit and confidently introduced me to one of his clients, whom I was able to help franchise their business. Danny is a true professional who values building genuine relationships with like-minded people.

This is without question a five-star review!

reviews.text: I’ve worked with Daniel Weiss over the years on a variety of business matters, and he’s consistently provided excellent legal guidance and support. Hes knowledgeable, responsive, and takes the time to understand the nuances of each situation. Whether it’s contract review, business structuring, or general legal strategy, I’ve always felt confident knowing he has the expertise to handle it. I highly recommend Danny to any business owner looking for a reliable and experienced attorney.

Danny was a huge help to my family and me when we quickly needed legal advice. While I live out of state and ultimately was not able to formally pursue Danny's legal services, he offered a generous consultation that was well beyond my expectations for an intro discussion and pointed us in the right direction for where to get local support. I felt supported, appreciated, and validated even during our brief time together, and based on this experience alone, I'd highly recommend Danny and his team to others.

Danny has been providing our business with legal support for a few months now. He is both efficient and easy to understand. His approachable demeanor makes it easy to ask questions and clarify any concerns, while his clear guidance has helped us navigate legal matters smoothly. We appreciate his professionalism and patience answering our questions and walking us through the processes. I highly recommend him to anyone seeking reliable legal support.

I just wanted to say a huge thank you to Danny. Working with him was a fantastic experience. He really knew his stuff and was super responsive to all my questions.

What impressed me the most was how Danny took the time to understand what I needed when I needed him the most. Getting into legal troubles could be nerve wrecking. Danny guided me through the steps calmly and helped me handle the matter in a professional manner.

I felt totally confident and at ease throughout the whole process. If you’re looking for a great lawyer, I highly recommend Danny.

Daniel Weiss is outstanding. I feel very fortunate to have met him in an office building back in 2022. From our first meeting, it was clear he was highly knowledgeable in the legal space, which led me to work with him. Daniel played a key role in drafting some of our largest enterprise contracts and even guided us through our exit.

If you’re looking for the right attorney, you’ve found him! I’m looking forward to working with Daniel again.

Daniel helped me with an Independent Contractor agreement, and I couldn't have asked for a better experience. He was extremely professional, efficient, and always provided honest, straightforward advice. Danny is the kind of attorney who genuinely cares about getting the best outcomes for his clients. His attention to detail and ability to navigate complex legal matters with ease made the entire process smooth and stress-free. If you're looking for a knowledgeable, reliable attorney, Danny is definitely the one to call!

As a small business owner both before and after Covid, I have had the pleasure of seeking legal advice from Daniel Weiss. In my opinion, what sets him apart is that he first asks about your goals and what you hope to achieve before agreeing to take on your case or legal challenge. He doesn’t just say yes to make a quick buck and for that, I am forever grateful. It’s reassuring to know that there are still honest lawyers who genuinely want to help.

Danny Weiss handled some IP and contract law for my design studio. He also helped us set up template agreements when we started branching out and needed more contracts to streamline things. He explained how everything worked, and tweaking them for my specific needs is very convenient.

Hiring him was an excellent investment for my business. He continues to go above and beyond to assist us with dispute strategies without running up fees-unlike other lawyers I’ve worked with. Fair. Honest. Whip-smart. Friendly.

Working with Daniel was an outstanding experience. He not only created all my business contracts with meticulous attention to detail but also provided invaluable guidance throughout the process. His professionalism and expertise ensured that everything was handled smoothly and efficiently. I highly recommend Daniel to anyone needing top-notch legal and business advice!

Working with Daniel was a great experience!  He's very professional, modern and friendly and makes you feel comfortable right from the start. He provided assistance and support with work contract negotiation and entrepreneurial advice. If you’re looking for top-quality legal help with a fresh approach, Daniel is who you want.

Danny is knowledgeable and experienced. He was super helpful to me with legal counsel when I was getting my small business up and running. He laid out the basics of different corporate structures and helped us choose the right one so we could grow into the biz we wanted.

I own a digital marketing firm, and Daniel has been a lifesaver for my business. He helped me with my Operating Agreement and various other contracts. He’s super responsive, proactive, and genuinely cares about his clients. Not only does he know his stuff, but he also takes the time to make sure you fully understand everything. I couldn’t recommend Daniel enough!

Daniel was referred to me by a friend and grateful to that friend for it. Daniel helped me promptly and professionally when I needed a quick agreement for a large personal loan I was making. He made sure I had all my I's dotted and T's crossed and made sure I had a solid binding agreement, which I could never have done my own.
I highly recommend Daniel.

Danny has been incredible in setting up business documentation and has even kept in touch as regulations change that may have an impact to me. He is incredibly pragmatic, straight forward, and honest in ensuring the best out comes and continues to be my first call. Additionally, a wealth of resources in terms of networking to other great professionals.

Very knowledgeable and smart lawyer. Helped us create a legal entity from scratch as well as the right user and privacy policies for an AI SaaS company. Best legal asset for any fast-growing tech company.
Daniel is an excellent attorney! Very down to earth, practical and knowledgable. I highly reccomend Daniel for your legal needs!
Daniel Weiss Law has advised me on a number of legal matters, professional and personal. Excellent results and impeccable service.

Daniel is an exceptional attorney. I've worked with Daniel for many years on several tech-related projects and, as someone who has  worked with many lawyers across the board, I can say confidently that Daniel is the guy you want on your team. He is available, responsive, caring, and will advocate tirelessly on your behalf. Highly recommend.
Excellent business and corporate attorney in Miami. Strongly recommend.

Update 2024:

Needed complicated agreement made for a new business and Danny Weiss Law delivered in a week! It’s always great working with Danny because he also understands business and pricing strategy. Highly recommend.

Working with Danny was a pleasure. I called Danny for some help looking over my work contracts involving equity & he was super responsive and easy to work with.

I highly recommend Daniel if you are looking for a business attorney!

Daniel's expertise was exactly what my small business needed. Unlike most attorneys I've met, Daniel has a great understanding of the way the world of small businesses and entrepreneurs has changed and modernized in recent years. It was refreshing to talk to someone who actually understood digital and remote businesses and made the whole process smooth and less overwhelming. I very much recommend working with Daniel. You can tell that he genuinely cares and wants his clients to succeed. He's THAT attorney you've been searching for.

Danny was recommended to me by my accountant and I needed to him as I was experiencing massive growth in my online buisness. Danny was so friendly and easy to work with. He helped me get everything set up and protected with my website and services I offer. He also helped me as I was hiring someone to work with me for the first time in my buisness.
Danny was so helpful and extremely thorough and knowledgeable during this process. I will continue to work with him as my buisness is still growing! Do not hesitate to work with him... he's the best and an absolute pleasure. It makes me feel good knowing that I have his legal advice when it comes to protecting my business!

Danny helped review our SaaS standard agreement and was a great partner as we worked through all the legal technicalities when we negotiated a contract with a big enterprise. Thanks to his effort we were able to accelerate the signing process.

Danny uses the perfect combination of a personal and professional approach to your business. He's impressively knowledgeable about his industry and craft, yet he also connects with and understands your individual business needs. I'm grateful to have worked with Danny and would highly recommend him to other business owners.
Danny is an impressive lawyer with an entrepreneurial mindset. I urge anyone who sees this, do yourself a favor and ask Danny for his advice.

Danny is great! He helped me with my website privacy policy, terms of use, and client agreement. He made the whole process super easy, explained what was happening in easy to understand terms, and got the job done quickly. Highly recommend!

Danny is fantastic. I’ve been working with him for about a year now. He is always available when I need him. If he is not familiar with a matter, he will go the extra mile to either research it on his own to figure out the best path forward, or will even find the right attorney that will help with the matter if it is out of his scope of practice. He always asks clarifying questions and is just a standup and great guy. We have used him for reviewing contracts, corporate/employee issues, and international issues. We have not used him for litigation (since we have had none), but if we ever have litigation issues, I expect him to be our first call as well.

Mr. Weiss came highly recommended by a friend, and I am happy I retained his services. From the initial consultation I felt comfortable
and confident that I had a quality person and lawyer for advise. Anyone in need of competent counsel and a person who cares, should hire Mr. Weiss. Five stars all the way!
Arthur is truly amazing thank you so much for helping my girlfriend you are truly a blessing in disguise! If you guys ever need some help this is the guy!!! 10/10 service

Arthur is one of the most hard working and honest attorneys I have dealt with. His dedication and persistency is amazing, the fees are moderate and truly reflect the efforts. He responds quickly to your emails/ phone calls and brings the winning results to your case. Thank you, Arthur.
Great Service, Great People, Great Community.

Excellent professional demeanor. He is transparent and easy to reach. I always knew the status of my case and I felt that i got an honest and accurate consultation with Arthur. Highly highly recommend!!

Mr Jones has handled all of my business transactions and lawsuits for a years now. I was blessed to find him. His approach protected my assets and resolved cases in the best way for my company. His guidance will be key as my company reforms itself. I would recommend him for any small business.

Recommended by my brother, I was very happy and surprised by the results of my case...I did not see the angles of truth Mr. Jones mentioned under consultations and felt at ease during my visit.

In court, the hearing went exactly the way Mr. Jones said it would and I felt a greater sense of vindication. It gave me renewed hope in our justice system. I consider myself extremely successful and educated, but I never saw what Mr. Jones saw. He knows the law better than anyone I've ever met or any other firm I have approached in the past. Being a Businessman, I have approached many firms. I thought they were good until the Arthur Firm.

Mr. Jones also represented me in a civil case for my business as a result of my other case, and that went exactly the way he said it would. I did not make it easy for him. I did not negotiate a good contract with a very powerful developer with a very powerful team of attorneys, but again, he saw angles I did not see and he settled in my favor. I got way more than I thought I would get. I thought I would have to pay...Instead I made a little something. I was very humbled by the experience. A good attorney changes everything. Mr. Jones handles all my contracts, now, no matter what.

The only note of criticism I would make is every time I tried to call and get a hold of Mr, Jones he was either in court or with a client. But at the same time, I get it. He's in high demand; and I should note, he did call me back the same day. He told me he would not go to bed until he called me back and at 2am, yup 2am, he called to answer my questions. So, I can attest, the man doesn't sleep until the work is done.

I stick with the Arthur Firm for all my legal needs, criminal or business related. He told me once, he doesn't sleep so I could. What more can I ask for? He wins and I get to sleep. I highly recommend Mr. Jones at The Arthur Firm, PL.

The attorneys at The Arthur Firm are dedicated in providing the best in Legal counseling, whether it being criminal defense or Business Law.  I have used them in a number of ways, and they always seem to be available 24 hours a day for any of my request.  Arthur J Jones, was a beacon of hope to my family at a time when our options appeared limited and the likelihood of a satisfactory resolution seemed impossible. Not only was he able to defend us from an unjust accusation, his calm and empathetic demeanor offered emotional comfort to myself and those I care about most. My children and I are eternally grateful for his service and I hereby recommend Mr. Jones without reservation.
Great service and experience. I felt that Arthur was very knowledgeable and was always available to answer any of my inquiries regarding my case.
Excellent business attorney. Works hard for his clients. Very reasonable when it comes to billing.
I highly recommend The Arthur Firm for any Business Litigation or Criminal Defense matter.  Arthur works hard on behalf of his clients, and his results prove it.

Their team is highly knowledgeable, responsive, and truly skilled at resolving legal matters efficiently.
My experience with them was excellent from start to finish. They took the time to listen, clearly explained every step of the process, and made me feel supported and confident throughout the entire case.
I highly recommend Dream Team Law to anyone who has been involved in a car accident and suffered injuries or damages. You will be in the hands of a dedicated, professional, and trustworthy legal team.

sheila santiesteban was amazing!! i really loved her personality and she has a lot of patience.

After a while once again, I had to complain but this time I asked to work with the attorney, which gave me more reassurance that my case was doing fine and that everything was in place. Anyways when I find out how much money I was going to get I range to the attorney about how I felt with her case managers (assistants) which she reply very unprofessional and this is my only complain about the attorney because she was helpful unlike the case managers (assistants) that all I got from them was bad information, lack of knowledge, etc. so I was trying to communicate that to her. This is my experience with Arguelles Legal in Coral Gables which I found unprofessional, dishonest, and deeply negligent in representing my interests.

They presented themselves as fully available and highly competent when they were negotiating my signature on a representation contract, yet their promises proved hollow.
I felt pressured into signing a contract for representation with the appearance of urgency and certainty. There was no clear disclosure of the risks, no written explanation of their fees in plain terms, and no honest discussion about expected outcomes or timelines.

Without my explicit consent or even a discussion of the consequences, they opened claims with my insurance. This was done in my name, without my informed authorization or understanding of what it would entail.
When I later pressed for explanations, they could not justify these actions beyond vague assurances, which I consider an egregious breach of trust and professional duty.

After I signed, their communication dropped to near-nothing. Attempts to reach them were met with silence, delays, and a sense that my case was no longer a priority.
There was no proactive follow-up, no updates, and no accountability for the promises they had made at the outset.

When I finally managed to reach them via email through the receptionist, I was confronted with a later claim that two lawsuit claims had been opened against my insurance and the at-fault driver’s insurer, and that they had dropped my representation because they “couldn’t reach me.”
This explanation is nothing short of a contradiction and, frankly, a fabrication: I received no calls, no emails, and no voicemails from them. There was no attempt to verify contact details, no documented attempts to reach me, and no legitimate basis to disengage from representing me.

I now have two open cases and must find a new attorney, wasting time, money, and emotional energy on remedying the fallout from their incompetence and misrepresentation.
Their conduct has created a complicated legal situation that I did not consent to and that far exceeds ordinary service failures; it feels like both neglect and deception.

Bottom line
If you value transparency, proactive communication, and ethical handling of your insurance and legal matters, you should avoid Arguelles Law Firm.  What I experienced was deceptive onboarding, unilateral actions without consent, and a total lack of professional accountability that left me vulnerable and underserved.

From the very first conversation, you feel heard. She takes the time to understand the full picture, not just the surface details. She doesn’t rush you, she doesn’t judge and she doesn’t treat you like just another case file. She treats you like a person whose future matters.

He has a great knowledge of the court system and has excellent working relationship with the jurists (judges). That’s important because if the judge doesn’t like your attorney or believe him or her the judge will take it out on their client. I haven’t had a ticket in years and I wanted to fight mine. The charges were all dismissed and I couldn’t be more pleased.

I cannot say enough amazing things about The Law Office of Claudia Perez, PLLC. Thanks to her dedication and persistence, I received a huge settlement that truly reflected what I went through. I am beyond grateful for her professionalism, honesty, and commitment to her clients.

If you are looking for an attorney who genuinely cares, keeps you informed, and will fight tirelessly for you, I highly recommend The Law Office of Claudia Perez, PLLC. They exceeded my expectations in every way.

From the very beginning of my accident case, I knew I was in the right hands with The Law Office of Claudia Perez. Together, Claudia and Carla are an incredible team — the perfect balance of legal expertise and compassionate support. Their communication was seamless, their work ethic was unmatched, and their commitment to justice and client care was beyond anything I’ve ever experienced.

If you’re looking for a law firm that treats you like family, fights for your best outcome, and goes the extra mile without ever being asked — The Law Office of Claudia Perez is it. And if you’re lucky enough to have Claudia Perez and Carla Deras on your side, you’re in the best possible hands.

Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for turning a traumatic experience into a journey of hope, strength, and justice. I will recommend this firm to everyone I know — not just because they won my case, but because they made me feel like I mattered every step of the way.

To start, I can tell that Claudia genuinely cares about the people she represents. What truly sets her apart is how HUMAN and supportive she is. Legal situations, especially personal injury cases, can feel overwhelming, confusing, and honestly pretty hopeless when you’re up against big companies. She was patient, compassionate, and completely judgment-free - but she’ll also tell you the truth. No sugarcoating, no false promises, and no unrealistic expectations, which I truly appreciated.

Claudia leads with honesty and integrity, and you can tell she is 100% focused on your best interest and your recovery. I also appreciated that she was accessible, communicates clearly, and never makes you feel like just another case. On top of that, she’s extremely knowledgeable and experienced in personal injury law, with strong negotiation skills and a solid reputation to back it up.

And when it comes time to advocate? Claudia is fierce. She isn’t afraid to speak up, stand her ground, and fight for you every step of the way. Knowing she was in my corner made all the difference and allowed me to de-stress and focus on my health.

If you’re dealing with an accident or slip and fall and want an attorney who is empathetic, honest, experienced, and truly on your side, I can’t recommend Claudia enough

This is a serious and professional firm. I'm an artist in the music and events fields, and I attempted the EB1 visa. I was convinced I had what it took to obtain it, and I succeeded. A Miami realtor friend, Nicola Condello, of Tosolini, Toniutti & Partners, recommended it to me. After listening to me on the phone for over an hour, on a Saturday, he took the situation to heart and was able to get everything under control, complete all the missing documentation, and submit the consular process for me and my family. It wasn't an easy job, but Nicola and the firm's professionalism and helpfulness ensured everything went smoothly, and finally, in September 2022, we moved permanently, with a Green Card on the way. America is a dream for many, and the EB1 artist visa is the most coveted and desired of all visas, but also the most difficult to obtain. I'm in Florida, and I succeeded. Thanks to Nicola Condello, whom I wholeheartedly recommend, because choosing the wrong lawyer could turn your dream into a nightmare.

reviews.text: I got into a car accident in November 2022, the car was completely totaled by being sandwiched in between two other cars, and we didn’t know who to turn to as far as help from an attorney. He has worked through this case with us for a little over 2 years, helping us ease through our physical therapy appointments and different offers to be made. He is willing to push to help you get the most out of your accident as much as he possibly can while updating every chance he gets. He made several offers that the companies gave him and always asked if we wanted to settle or keep going longer to receive more money for injury and compensation, but unlike other lawyers he is willing to fight until the very end to help you in every way possible. If you see this review and heard about Scott and aren’t sure if he’s the right one, take it from someone that’s been in previous car accidents with terrible lawyers who just settle because they don’t want to keep pushing for the case, Scott is the right one for you and will recommend him to every single person that needs his help!

I hired Chris to help with a case involving repeated spam calls with voicemail left, and the experience exceeded my expectations. From the first consultation, he showed deep knowledge of consumer protection laws and took the time to clearly explain the legal process and my options. He was responsive, professional, and genuinely committed to protecting my rights.

Thanks to Chris’s expertise, we were able to reach a favorable settlement that held the company accountable. If you’re dealing with unwanted robocalls or spam calls/texts, I highly recommend Chris for his dedication, professionalism, and results-driven approach.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Stephanie, for the kind recommendation and for trusting me with your case. I’m glad we could secure a favorable settlement and hold the company accountable. It was a pleasure guiding you through the process, and I’m always here if you or anyone you know needs help with robocalls or spam texts. I appreciate you sharing your experience.

reviews.text: Gold Law is the best. They fight for you when the so-called telemarketers keep calling you and they won’t stop even after you’re on the do not call list that’s nationwide. Chris was very attentive and made sure that everything followed through for me. I will definitely use you again in the future thank you so much.

reviews.text: I’ve been plagued by marketing calls from home wholesalers and “mortgage bro’s” for years. Sometimes getting 10-15 calls per day from people wanting to buy homes or refinance mortgages for homes that I don’t even own but that some data broker has listed me as the contact phone number for someone with a similar name. I’ve tried everything to get my name off of the lists but they still keep calling. While Attorney Gold hasn’t been able to solve my problem of incessant phone calls he has been able to get me fairly compensated for some of the time and frustration that these constant interruptions have caused me. While it’s still frustrating to not be able to answer the phone from an unknown number without it being someone trying to refinance my non existent mortgage it does feel a little bit better knowing that with the help of an experienced attorney like Chris Gold I can hold these companies accountable for the harm they cause innocent consumers.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your detailed feedback, Jake. We're glad to hear that Attorney Gold could provide you with some compensation and support during this frustrating experience. It’s important to hold these companies accountable, and we appreciate your recognition of our efforts. We’re here to assist you further if you need any more help. Your satisfaction is important to us.

reviews.text: My daughter was passenger, terribly injured in an auto accident in Ft. Lauderdale, Florida in December '25.  I live in Maryland, but a good friend of mine who knows the area well, referred me with strongest recommendations to the Deutsch, Blumberg & Caballero law group.  I called their office, explained some of the details of accident, and was immediately put in touch with Beau Blumberg.   Beau and his admin staff were prompt and efficient in every aspect of the case, painstakingly working through details with my daughter, investigating every aspect of the accident carefully, and ultimately winning a large settlement for her.  I feel very strongly that the personal care and the settlement were far superior than what she would have received from any other attorneys in that region.  Thank you, Beau, and your entire organization!

Things don't happen overnight; everything takes time. I trusted you, and you're showing me that we can achieve this. People think that just paying for a consultation will get their case sorted out, but no, it doesn't work that way. Thank you, attorney, and your team. Congratulations, and many blessings! ✨🫶
The best lawyer, you can confidently put your case in the hands of the best, De la Rosa Law is the best, blessings to all your team.

Scam... Don't fall for it. They gave me a free initial consultation and told me my case qualified for representation, then made me pay $250, which I paid without hesitation. I had a second interview with a paralegal where I explained everything in more detail because they were supposedly preparing the case file for the lawyer. Four days later (Thursday at 3 pm) was the appointment with the lawyer. The day arrived, and he didn't call me. I waited a few hours and called, but only got an answering machine. I looked on the website and saw another phone number, which I called. The secretary answered and told me the lawyer wasn't going to take the case. I saw there are other similar scams when I read the reviews. People, don't fall into the hands of these individuals. There are surely qualified lawyers out there, but this one clearly isn't.
I have a case with the Rosa Law firm and for the moment I am receiving very good service. Thank you very much.

Well, I stopped paying because I don't see any interest in my case. No one takes me seriously and they throw the case from one to another and do nothing. They always make excuses and they made me pay for a consultation and the commercial they have online says it's free... I was disappointed.

Thanks to Mr. Lamberto Roman for his excellent explanations and his concern for helping me satisfactorily with my immigration case. Mr. Roman proved to be a very kind, polite, and very professional person with excellent customer service. 👍🏻. Thanks to Mr. Lamberto Roman, for such excellent explanations and his concern for helping me satisfactorily with my immigration case. Mr. Roman proved to be a very kind, polite, and very professional person with excellent customer service. 👍🏻

My experience with De la Rosa Law has been great! I do have to say in the beginning I was very on high alert and very untrustworthy just because I didn’t meet or see any of these people in person before starting the process, basically just did it by Faith. Thankfully, every time I got to speak to any representative they were very informative very patient and very kind. I had so many questions and needed reassurance that they were legitimate almost every time, but now that my case is almost to the finish line, I can gladly say and confirm to you guys that they are the real deal and they are great. Specifically, Juliet Tobon and Alex Maradiaga were very encouraging, kind and respectful throughout the process. I even got to message with oscar de la rosa himself a few times, to confirm a few things and he too was very helpful. Thank you to everyone in the de la rosa law office for your support!

Great Service, the attention was magnificent, always attentive to my questions, Ariel was a tremendous person with the welcome, Eunice and Alicia assisted me with the documentation for the case, I had the pleasure of meeting Mr. Attorney Oscar De La Rosa and Attorney Alexandra who handled the case. Miss Keilly & Juliet took care of all the final details step by step, they called me up to 3 times a day and with constant follow-ups by email. I received congratulations on several occasions for the amount and how quickly I gathered the required and additional documents, apparently the majority of people only complain about the service I have realized when reading some of the reviews, but some people do not inform themselves well and believe that with a $ 250 appointment a lawyer will fix their documentation. Totally satisfied with the De La Rosa Law firm.
I thought they were professionals until they kept me in the dark about my case. The question is, who does this work and where? Why don't they submit it to USCIS?

reviews.text: Highly recommend they get a new intake specialist called today for an employment consult they guy kept asking me to repeat myself over and over because he need to type. I stated my case 10 times over the phone and eventually hung up. Red flag before they even take your case

This is a very professional, yet personal law firm. Bradley listened to everything i had to say, always responded when I needed, worked with me day after day,  and got me the settlement I was fighting for! This was not my first experience with attorneys, but by far the best. I can go on and on about how well Bradley handled my case honestly! If you need help call this firm they are amazing

Mr. Switkes is the best attorney I have ever worked with. He explained everything in terms I could easily understand and he was always very responsive whenever I had questions throughout the case.

I highly recommend Mr. Switkes to anyone looking for a great attorney.

I found Mr. Switkes to be very caring. I am a prior client with great results. I recently called his office about a new case I was hoping he could handle. He was honest in telling me his office does not handle medical malpractice and he immediately referred me to an attorney who specialized in the field. He always gives great advice and is always willing to help. I will continue to use this law firm for all my legal needs and questions. They are trustworthy, and that’s hard to find.

I highly recommend this law firm. I found them to be very professional and they gave me great representation. They solved my problem quickly and efficiently. Very Grateful to Mr. Switkes and his office.

Mr. Switkes and his staff were amazing! Very compassionate and professional. They made me feel like my case was of upmost importance. Truly a kind human being, hard to find in this profession. Will definitely recommend.

I was nervous this being my first time dealing with a lawyer personally but Brad Zappala did not disappoint. He went above and beyond my expectations to settle a wedding venue dispute. I will recommend Brad to all family and friends that are in need of a professional and highly effective lawyer!

Switkes & Zappala is a great law firm. They helped me with a battle with my old landlord (for terrible reasons). There were always professional and quick to respond to questions. First time needing a lawyer and very happy I went with their law firm. Hopefully I don't need a lawyer again but if I do I know where I'll go.

My experience with the group of lawyers was exceptional since the English language is not my first language. I felt so comfortable with them that I didn't feel like a customer. I also had the assistance of one of the lawyers of his buffet that guided me at all times. Robert is a lawyer who dedicates his time to understanding the case. Thanks to his professional work, my case was resolved positively in my favor.
I genuinely recommend this law firm.
